text:
Created attachment 184975
testcase

Please see the attached Makefile.

> # portlint -A
> WARN: Makefile: USE_* seen before USES.  According to the porters-handbook, USES must appear first.

Please also always print line numbers for each reference to port files, like USE_ in this case.

portlint-2.17.10
